user.title: Vacation Heating
user.description: Predicts when your floor heating must start so each room is warm when you return from vacation. Pick the entities shared by all rooms; afterwards, add each room via 'Add room' on the integration page.

data_description.end_date_entity: Entity holding the date and time your vacation ends (your arrival). Must be an input_datetime with time enabled or a datetime entity.
Entity holding the date and time your vacation ends (your arrival). Must be an input_datetime with time enabled or a datetime entity.

data_description.climate_entity: The thermostat of the room to pre-heat.
The thermostat of the room to pre-heat.

data_description.heat_rates: One entry per point, formatted 'outdoor temperature: heating rate in °C per hour', e.g. '-10: 0.2'. Entries are sorted automatically; values in between are interpolated linearly.
data_description.action: What to do on the climate entity when the calculated start time is reached.
data_description.preset_mode: The climate entity's presets are listed; only used when the action includes setting a preset.
data_description.preset_temperatures: Optional. The temperature each preset heats to, formatted 'preset: temperature', e.g. 'comfort: 21'. With a preset-only action the prediction targets the selected preset's temperature instead of the target temperature.
data_description.target_temperature: Room temperature to reach by the time you arrive.

error.invalid_heat_rates: Heat rates must be entered as 'outdoor temperature: rate' pairs with positive rates and no duplicate temperatures, e.g. '-10: 0.2'.
error.invalid_preset_temperatures: Preset temperatures must be entered as 'preset: temperature' pairs without duplicate presets, e.g. 'comfort: 21'.
error.preset_mode_required: Select a preset when the action includes setting a preset.
